summary: Iteration 53: UI/UX Refinement Pass - All 14 features tested successfully. Login works (garcia.rapha2@gmail.com/12345). TAP page: tab cards show guest name, tab number badge, total clearly. Barman dropdown has z-index 9999 and appears ABOVE menu cards. Item details buttons (pencil/remove) are ALWAYS VISIBLE not hover-only. TABLE page: add table button works, form shows with validation for empty/duplicate/non-numeric inputs, server dropdown has z-index 9999. KITCHEN: proper spacing, operational status colors. MANAGER: Tips tab with detail table, Menu with List/Kanban toggle, Settings with venue creation form, Tables by Server with WebSocket + polling. Sidebar tabs use neutral foreground color (rgb(139, 151, 193)), not purple. Revenue chart uses green/emerald color.
critical_code_review_comments: Z-index fix correctly implemented: barman-dropdown and server-dropdown both use inline style={{ zIndex: 9999 }}
Item details buttons ('Item details' and 'Remove') are always visible in order panel, not hover-only
Tab cards redesigned showing: guest name, tab number badge (#125), 'Tab #125' text, and total amount ($26.00)
Table cards show table number, seat count icon, and status badge (Free/Busy)
Add table form validates: empty input (disabled button), duplicate table number, non-numeric input
Manager sidebar tabs use neutral foreground color (rgb(139, 151, 193)), not purple
Manager revenue chart uses green/emerald bars for revenue, orange for costs - no purple
Tips section has proper table structure with columns: Server, Guest, Tab #, Total Spent, Tip, %, Time
Settings has venue creation form with name input, mode selector, Create Venue button
Tables by Server shows servers grouped with table cards, total running amount
Kitchen KDS has 5 kanban columns (Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Delayed) with proper spacing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX refinement pass complete. All 14 requested features verified: 1) Login works, 2) TAP tab cards redesigned with clear guest name/tab#/total, 3) Barman dropdown z-index=9999 appears above cards, 4) Item details buttons always visible, 5) TABLE page loads with table cards showing seats/status, 6) Add table button works, 7) Add table form validation (empty/duplicate/non-numeric), 8) Server dropdown z-index=9999, 9) Kitchen KDS has improved spacing, 10) Tips section with detail table, 11) Menu has List/Kanban toggle, 12) Settings has venue creation form, 13) Sidebar tabs neutral (not purple), 14) Revenue chart green (not purple). WebSocket + polling implemented for Tables by Server section.
